news.t: VanEck to Transition Underlying Indexes for Several of Its Municipal Bond ETFs

overview.description: The VanEck Long Muni ETF (MLN) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund tracks a market value-weighted index of investment grade, tax-exempt US municipal bonds with nominal maturities of at least 17 years. MLN was launched on Jan 2, 2008 and is issued by VanEck.
infoTable: ICE Long AMT-Free Broad National Municipal

data.title: VanEck to Transition Underlying Indexes for Several of Its Municipal Bond ETFs
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--VanEck announces plans to change underlying indexes tracked by some of the firm's municipal bond ETFs to new indexes from ICE Data Indices (“ICE”)
